testcase.name: Accounts Overview › TC-ACCT-UI-004: unauthenticated access to /overview.htm redirects to login @regression @ui
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › accounts/overview.spec.js:66:3 › Accounts Overview › TC-ACCT-UI-004: unauthenticated access to /overview.htm redirects to login @regression @ui
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected pattern: /\/parabank\/index.htm/ Received string: "http://localhost:8080/parabank/overview.htm" Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "http://localhost:8080/parabank/overview.htm"
75 | 76 | // ParaBank redirects unauthenticated requests back to the login page. > 77 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(new RegExp(ROUTES.LOGIN)); | ^ 78 | 79 | await page.close(); 80 | await context.close(); at /Users/jsernav/Documents/repositories/claude-code-1/tests/ui/accounts/overview.spec.js:77:26
